violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

(Cheese and deli meats) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Bar area is lacking an 3 bay sink to properly wash, rinse, and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen and basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Handwashing sink at the bar and the bathroom is lacking handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC wash and sanitized equipment during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Inspector observed restricted pesticide (RAID spray).PIC informed to cease use and remove from establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

The presence of (roaches ) is not controlled as evidenced by (live activity ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Dishes was observed being stored in mop sink.PIC informed an moved dishes to ware washing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Wood is used in the construction of (a bar and food storage area ) in the (kitchen and bar ) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Bar area is lacking a 3 bay sink to properly wash, rinsed, and sanitized equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen and basement) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

Wood is used in the construction of counter (ice machine area) in the serving area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
